name: Max Starcke Park
description: 227-acre park on the Guadalupe River with golf course, tennis, fishing, kayaking, walking trails, and Kids Kingdom Playscape.

name: Downtown Seguin & Main Street
description: Historic downtown with vintage storefronts, boutique shopping, restaurants, breweries, and cafes. The heart of the community.

name: Seguin Heritage Museum
description: Explore the history of Juan Seguín, the Texas Revolution, and the city's development from frontier town to modern community.

name: Guadalupe River Kayaking
description: Scenic kayaking through Seguin along the Guadalupe River with easy put-in at Max Starcke Park.

name: ZDT's Amusement Park
description: Family-owned amusement park with go-karts, batting cages, mini golf, and a wooden roller coaster.
